en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains valid Czech Republic Social Insurance documentation in the Czech Republic Social Insurance Applicability Assessment questionnaire.\t
Czech Republic Statutory Labor Insurance Certificate

Every employer is legally required to register with the Czech Social Security Administration (ČSSZ) within 8 days of hiring their first employee. This process creates an official record of the employer in the ČSSZ employer register and results in the issuance of a unique employer identification number.
Please provide your Czech Social Security Administration (ČSSZ) ID Number confirming your company’s registration with employee insurance schemes.
You may find your Employer Registration Certificate on your ePortal on the ČSSZ website.
Please provide your Employer Registration Certificate confirming your company’s registration with employee insurance schemes.

The OSSZ issues a “Certificate of No Indebtedness” confirming that the employer does not owe insurance premiums, penalties or surcharges. The application can be submitted in person, by post or on your ePortal.
Please provide your Certificate of No Indebtedness confirming your company’s registration with employee insurance schemes.
